description: Repository mount contract. Defines how child repositories are mounted for worker execution. Worker operates against an isolated clone, never against live branches directly. Supports alias-based resolution via repo_registry.json.

target_repo_alias.description: Short alias from repo_registry.json. Resolves to github_url, default_branch, auth_method, and workspace_slug. Exactly one of target_repo_alias or target_repo_url must be provided.

target_repo_url.description: Direct GitHub clone URL. Only permitted when repo_pull_policy.allow_raw_url=true. Blocked by default.

target_branch.description: Branch to clone. Must be in repo_registry entry's allowed_branches. Falls back to default_branch if omitted.

intake_fields.exactly_one_rule: Exactly one of target_repo_alias or target_repo_url must be provided. Both present = FAIL. Neither present = FAIL.

step_0_resolve.action: Resolve target_repo_alias to a repo_registry.json entry.
sequence: 1. Load sys/registry/repo_registry.json.
2. Find entry where repo_alias === target_repo_alias.
3. If no match: FAIL — unknown alias. Do not proceed.
4. If entry.enabled === false: FAIL — repo disabled. Do not proceed.
5. Resolve github_url, default_branch, auth_method, workspace_slug from entry.
6. If target_branch provided: verify target_branch ∈ entry.allowed_branches. If not: FAIL — branch not allowed.
7. If target_branch absent: use entry.default_branch.
8. Emit mount_receipt with resolved fields.
step_0_resolve.raw_url_gate: If target_repo_url is provided instead of alias: load sys/registry/repo_pull_policy.json. If allow_raw_url=false: FAIL — raw URLs blocked. If allow_raw_url=true: proceed but log warning.

mount_path_derivation.description: Mount path is deterministically derived from the resolved workspace_slug and branch. No manual path construction permitted.

mount_receipt.description: Artifact emitted after clone completes. Captures resolved values plus commit-level integrity fields for audit trail. Written per job under outbox path.

fields.resolved_alias: The alias that was resolved (or null if raw URL).
fields.resolved_repo_url: The github_url resolved from registry (or the raw URL).
fields.resolved_commit_sha: HEAD SHA of the cloned workspace after clone completes. Captured via `git rev-parse HEAD`.
fields.remote_head_sha: SHA of origin/<resolved_branch> after clone completes. Captured via `git rev-parse origin/<branch>`.
fields.detached_head: Boolean. True if the cloned workspace is in detached HEAD state. Captured via `git symbolic-ref HEAD` (failure = detached).
fields.heir_present: Boolean. True only if heir.doctrine.yaml exists in mounted repo root.
fields.heir_valid: Boolean. True only if heir.doctrine.yaml passes schema validation against sys/contracts/heir.schema.json.
fields.heir_hash: String. SHA-256 hash of heir.doctrine.yaml file contents. Format: sha256:<hex64>.
fields.heir_doctrine_version: String. The doctrine_version value extracted from heir.doctrine.yaml.
fields.doctrine_version: Current Garage doctrine version at resolution time.
fields.timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp after clone and integrity capture.

step_1_clone.action: Clone resolved_repo_url at resolved_branch into resolved_workspace_path (/workspaces/<workspace_slug>/<branch>/).
step_1_clone.isolation: Worker receives a fresh clone. No shared state with other executions. No access to other branches.
step_1_clone.authentication: Auth method from mount_receipt (ssh or https_token). Garage service credentials. Child repos grant read/write access to garage service account.

step_1b_integrity_capture.action: Capture commit-level integrity fields immediately after clone, before any other operation.
sequence: 1. resolved_commit_sha = `git rev-parse HEAD` in cloned workspace.
2. remote_head_sha = `git rev-parse origin/<resolved_branch>` in cloned workspace.
3. detached_head = true if `git symbolic-ref HEAD` fails; false otherwise.
4. Write all three fields into mount_receipt.

fail_conditions.action: FAIL mount. Do not proceed to step_2_validate. Record in mount_receipt and execution log.
FAIL mount. Clone is not at remote HEAD. Do not proceed. Record SHA mismatch in mount_receipt and execution log.

step_1b_integrity_capture.rationale: A fresh clone should always be on the branch tip. Detached HEAD or SHA mismatch indicates a corrupted clone, shallow fetch error, or race condition. Fail closed.

step_2_validate.action: Validate mounted repo structure against doctrine.
checks: IMO_CONTROL.json exists and is valid JSON
DOCTRINE.md exists and declares conformance to imo-creator
CTB branch structure present (src/sys/, src/data/, src/app/, src/ai/, src/ui/)
doctrine_version in IMO_CONTROL.json matches or exceeds minimum_compatible from doctrine_version.json
step_2_validate.on_failure: Mount rejected. WORK_PACKET marked FAIL with mount validation errors. No execution proceeds.

step_2b_heir_validation.action: Validate child repo HEIR identity record against Garage contract. Populate deterministic HEIR fields in mount_receipt.
sequence: 1. Check if heir.doctrine.yaml exists in mounted repo root.
2. Set mount_receipt.heir_present = true if file exists, false otherwise.
3. If heir_present === false: FAIL mount. Set heir_valid=false, heir_hash=null, heir_doctrine_version=null.
4. Compute SHA-256 hash of heir.doctrine.yaml file contents. Set mount_receipt.heir_hash = sha256:<hex64>.
5. Parse YAML into JSON object. If parse fails: FAIL mount. Set heir_valid=false.
6. Extract doctrine_version field. Set mount_receipt.heir_doctrine_version = extracted value.
7. Validate parsed object against sys/contracts/heir.schema.json.
8. If schema validation fails: FAIL mount. Set heir_valid=false. Record specific validation errors.
9. If schema validation passes: set mount_receipt.heir_valid = true.
10. Verify heir_doctrine_version is compatible with current doctrine_version.json. If stale: FAIL mount.

fail_conditions.action: FAIL mount. Child repo has no identity record. Do not proceed.
FAIL mount. Identity record is malformed or does not conform to Garage HEIR contract. Do not proceed.

step_2b_heir_validation.rationale: HEIR validation is centralized in the Garage. Child repos declare identity only. The Garage validates. Mount_receipt captures deterministic boolean + hash fields instead of ambiguous status strings.

step_3_scope_lock.action: Restrict file system writes to WORK_PACKET.file_targets only.
step_3_scope_lock.enforcement: File writes outside file_targets are intercepted and rejected by execution_runner. Read access remains unrestricted for context.
step_3_scope_lock.monitoring: All file operations logged for auditor review.

step_4_execute.action: Hand control to worker agent within scoped mount.
step_4_execute.timeout: Execution timeout defined per execution_type in execution_runner contract.
step_4_execute.artifact_collection: All modified files and generated artifacts collected by artifact_writer on completion.

step_5_unmount.action: Freeze mount state. No further modifications permitted.
step_5_unmount.handoff: Mount snapshot passed to auditor for evaluation. Worker loses access.

mount_invariants: One mount per WORK_PACKET. No mount reuse across work packets.
Mount is destroyed after certification is issued.
Worker cannot modify mount infrastructure or mount contract.
Mount does not persist between executions.
Failed mounts are logged and cleaned up. No zombie mounts.
Mount workspace is ephemeral. No persistent storage between runs.
